title: Well-formed phased migration — correct NOT VALID + CONCURRENTLY + backfill pattern
expected_feedback: No violations. Correctly implements phased migration: (1) add nullable column with lock_timeout, (2) cursor-based backfill, (3) idempotent CHECK constraint with NOT VALID + VALIDATE (non-blocking), (4) SET NOT NULL leveraging PG 12+ CHECK shortcut. All DDL has lock_timeout set.
